data.title: audit: refresh `CLAUDE.md` routing for skogai-caveman
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Audit and refresh the repo-root `CLAUDE.md` so it reflects the current skill inventory and routing model.

Known drift already visible:

* it still references `project-vision` even though the repo now has `skills/skogai-vision/`
* it should be checked against any new routing-file strategy for the repo

Scope:

* update skill names and descriptions to match the current tree
* keep routing concise and high-signal
* ensure it points agents toward the right first artifacts and repo workflows

Done when `CLAUDE.md` is an accurate current entrypoint for the repository.
